title: DonutSMP Client
body:
🍩 DonutSMP Client

The DonutSMP Client is a carefully crafted Minecraft client-side modpack optimized for playing on the DonutSMP server. It focuses on performance, stability, and quality-of-life improvements, while staying completely fair and server-friendly.

🚀 Performance

This modpack includes modern optimization mods that:

significantly improve FPS

reduce loading times

enhance overall game stability

It is designed to run smoothly even on lower-end systems.

⚙️ Quality of Life

The DonutSMP Client enhances the gameplay experience with:

improved HUD and GUI customization

useful client-side features

better inventory and interface management

All features are meant to improve comfort and usability without affecting gameplay balance.

🎮 Server-Friendly & Fair

All included mods are client-side only and fully server-compliant. No game mechanics are altered, and no unfair advantages are provided.

🎨 Customizable

Many aspects of the client can be adjusted to fit personal preferences, allowing every player to tailor the experience to their liking.
